subcodes.first_line: All have been created to hearken unto the Word of God and follow His commandment - that which the Truth hath ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کل از برای اصغاء کلمه الله و اتباع امرش خلق شده اند آنچه حق بان امر فرموده و
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
